thin.$description: Subtle borders — nav border, upload borders, inner borders

medium.$description: Dashed dividers, status pills, inner card borders

thick.$description: Card borders, button borders, avatar borders, primary UI elements

dashed.$description: Dividers, upload card borders, row separators

xs.$description: Notification avatar small radius, tiny elements

md.$description: Back button, close button, nav action buttons

base.$description: Input fields, driver avatar, skeleton placeholders

lg.$description: Buttons, bell icon, nav tabs, profile avatar

xl.$description: Card component default, confirm modal button

2xl.$description: Ride card, route pickers, toast, main CTA buttons

4xl.$description: Request modal, search expanded, upload cards

full.$description: Search bar collapsed, nav bar, nav pills, avatar circle
